overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character exploring a gothic castle interior. The character ascends grand staircases and corridors before entering a vast candlelit hall with floating lights and long dining tables, reminiscent of the Harry Potter universe.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle staircase and upper corridor

events.description: character turns right at the top of the grand staircase onto the upper landing
character approaches and opens large wooden double doors leading to the Great Hall antechamber

agents.ego_description: wizard character ascends a wide stone staircase and proceeds along a wood-paneled corridor with gothic windows

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps and ornate railings
tall pointed arch window with blue stained glass panes
dark wooden paneling with vertical grain patterns
medieval knight armor standing on display pedestal

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character ascending a grand stone staircase in a gothic castle. The environment features stone balustrades, wall-mounted torches, and stained glass windows. The character turns onto an upper landing and walks along a wood-paneled corridor past suits of armor, approaching large wooden doors at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with enchanted floating candles

events.description: character enters the vast Great Hall revealing thousands of floating candles and an enchanted ceiling showing night sky
character looks upward at the floating candles while continuing to walk down the central aisle

agents.ego_description: wizard walks down the central aisle of the Great Hall, gazing up at the floating candles and enchanted ceiling while passing long dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air creating a warm glow against the enchanted ceiling
wooden banquet tables set with plates and food remnants
ceiling enchanted to resemble a night sky with clouds and stars
vertical banners hanging from the walls representing different houses

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent Great Hall with a high enchanted ceiling showing a night sky filled with floating candles. The hall contains long dining tables arranged in rows. The character walks down the central aisle, looking up at the magical candles and passing stone pillars and house banners on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: front of great hall near faculty table and podium

events.description: character reaches the front stone podium and turns around to face the hall entrance
character turns toward the left side exit and walks away from the central aisle

agents.ego_description: character explores the front faculty area near the stone podium, then turns and walks toward a side corridor exit

entered.detail: raised circular stone platform with steps at the front of the hall
long elevated table on a platform for faculty seating
gothic arched doorway leading to side corridors

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the front of the Great Hall near the faculty table and stone podium, with the large stained glass windows behind. After pausing to look around at the floating candles above, the character turns and walks toward a side exit, passing between the dining tables and approaching a gothic archway leading to a corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the narrow, enclosed corridors of a gothic castle into the vast, magical expanse of a candlelit Great Hall. It begins with the character ascending a grand stone staircase flanked by torches and stained glass, moving through a wood-paneled corridor lined with suits of armor toward a set of large wooden doors. As the doors open, the scene expands into a magnificent hall where the ceiling transforms into a night sky filled with floating candles above rows of long dining tables. The camera then glides down the central aisle past stone pillars and house banners before reaching a stone podium and faculty table. Finally, after a brief pause to observe the magical ceiling, the character turns away from the light of the stained glass windows to exit through a gothic archway.
